summary: App with team member management functionality. Fixing 'Add Team Member' modal to remove permission errors and allow any logged-in user to add team members, while keeping the form simple (Name, Email ID, Role fields).
architectural_notes: Backend canister (nkwgw-dqaaa-aaaad-qiqha-cai) on Internet Computer - can enter stopped state after deployment, requiring redeploy to restart

existing_features.title: Update the `AddUserModal` component to remove any frontend-side permission guard or error display (the 'You do not have permission to add team members' message). The modal should show only the clean form with Name, Email ID, and Role fields, plus Cancel and Add Member buttons.

new_feature_requests.summary: Remove the permission check that blocks non-admin users from adding team members in the backend. The `addTeamMember` function should allow any authenticated caller to add a team member without role-based restriction.

projectName: Fix Add Team Member modal — remove permission error and enable saving
